tray.title: Compare tray
tray.limit: You can compare up to 4 agents.

narrative.title: How to choose, in plain words

notice.title: Image recognition note
notice.platformImage: A recognized platform image is not a platform safety guarantee; it only means the platform recognizes a Docker image it can run in a controlled cloud runtime.
notice.sellerHosted: An unrecognized image means the runtime boundary is outside the platform-controlled cloud environment, so buyer input may be exposed to the seller runtime.
notice.buyerChoice: The platform only shows the runtime-boundary signal; buyers decide whether the material is sensitive enough to require it.

page.title: Compare Agents
page.subtitle: Select the best Agent based on multiple metrics
page.emptyDesc: Please select at least 2 agents to compare
page.limit: Only the first 4 agents are shown; remove extras from the URL or the compare list.

rules.try-first: Try First: Best balance of risk, complexity, and trust.
rules.formal-integration: Formal Integration: Powerful but complex or lacks onboarding.
rules.avoid-for-now: Avoid For Now: All options have high risk or lack trust evidence.
rules.manual-judgment: Manual Judgment: Similar metrics, please evaluate based on your use case.
